scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck:app && npm run typecheck:tooling
scripts.lint: eslint src e2e scripts eslint.config.mjs vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts playwright.pwa.config.ts playwright.visual.config.ts
scripts.format: prettier --write src e2e scripts/**/*.mjs .github README.md SECURITY.md docs/**/*.md index.html public/*.webmanifest .lintstagedrc.json tsconfig*.json playwright.config.ts playwright.pwa.config.ts playwright.visual.config.ts vite.config.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src e2e scripts/**/*.mjs .github README.md SECURITY.md docs/**/*.md index.html public/*.webmanifest .lintstagedrc.json tsconfig*.json playwright.config.ts playwright.pwa.config.ts playwright.visual.config.ts vite.config.ts
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck:all && npm run build && npm test
scripts.verify:e2e: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:pwa
scripts.verify:full: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck:all && npm run build && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:pwa
